rationale: Review 1's approve is sound: the new Conv Inv/Group/mapValue code (the substantial additions) correctly reuses Bialgebra.Convolution, comp_convMul_distrib, and the antipode axiom with no duplication of public declarations. Review 2's sole finding (antipode_convMul_id at line 65) is a correct but trivial 4-line one-use wrapper whose docstring already notes the restatement; inlining/making-private changes nothing material for reuse or maintainers, so the resulting PRs are equivalent.
